title: The Broken Script Enhanced
description: A horror modpack based around The Broken Script, adding small mods to aid it in giving you a sense of fear and paranoia.
body:
# OVERVIEW:
The Broken Script Enhanced is a lightweight, carefully crafted modpack designed to improve your TBS experience, without ruining the feel or theme of the mod. It includes easy multiplayer support through Essential Mod, as well as voicechat and sound physics. It also overhauls visuals and ambience making weather, caves, and taking damage much more intresting and scary, while still being heavily optimized by mods like Sodium to keep your game running as well as possible.

# CONFIG:
The modpack comes with mods already configured, so you don't have to waste time on doing it yourself. The Broken Script will not crash your game, ban you, explode your base, or toggle vhs. Everything else remains enabled (you can still change these features in the config). The shaders are disabled by default (you can turn them on in video settings or pressing 'O'), but there are a few options to choose from, none of which break the moon or mess with the mod. No keybinds are conflicting, and voicechat is setup to default audio devices, so you will simply have invite a friend and start playing!

# INCLUDES:
3D Skin Layers - https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers

Architectury API - https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api

Attack Through Grass - https://modrinth.com/mod/attack-through-grass
